pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot parent version to a newer patch release.
Change the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the JDK migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21; keeping java.version at 17 would result in compilation errors or warnings if Java 21-specific features are used, or simply fail to target the correct bytecode version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Spring Cloud version property to a newer release compatible with the updated Spring Boot version.
